modelUpgrade.upgradeTitle: Update the "Image recognition" model to search and recognize photos

openPersonPop.title: People recognition notice
openPersonPop.descriptionP1: Once enabled, the system will automatically  categorize photos based on facial features for easier organization and searching
openPersonPop.descriptionP2: Facial data recognition and processing are performed locally on the NAS and are not uploaded to the cloud
openPersonPop.descriptionAdminP3: You can disable "People recognition" model at any time in "Settings > AI settings“. After disabling, existing categorization information will still be retained. To completely delete facial recognition data, please go to "UGREEN AI > Model management" to remove the model
openPersonPop.descriptionUserP3: You can disable "People recognition" model at any time in "Settings > AI settings“. After disabling, existing categorization information will still be retained. To completely delete facial recognition data, please contact the admin to go to "UGREEN AI > Model management" to remove the model
openPersonPop.hasOpenDesAdminP3: You can disable "People recognition" model at any time in "Settings > AI settings“. After disabling, existing categorization information will still be retained. Please note that due to changes in model status, version updates, or other similar factors, some recognized data could be lost and would need to be re-recognized. Please proceed with caution. To completely delete facial recognition data, please go to "UGREEN AI > Model Management" to remove the model
openPersonPop.hasOpenDesUserP3: You can disable "People recognition" model at any time in "Settings > AI settings“. After disabling, existing categorization information will still be retained. Please note that due to changes in model status, version updates, or other similar factors, some recognized data could be lost and would need to be re-recognized. Please proceed with caution. To completely delete facial recognition data, please contact the admin to go to "UGREEN AI > Model Management" to remove the model
